---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new command, rule, template, or snippet
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What should be added?**
A clear description of the new command, rule, template, or snippet.

**Type**

- [ ] Slash command (`.claude/commands/`)
- [ ] Rule (`.claude/rules/`)
- [ ] Template (`templates/`)
- [ ] Snippet (`snippets/`)
- [ ] Hook (`settings.json`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`)
- [ ] Ecosystem link (`ECOSYSTEM.md`)
- [ ] Other

**Why does this belong in the default setup?**
Explain why every developer would benefit from this, not just your personal workflow.

**Example usage**
Show what it looks like when someone uses it.
